active_campaigns.title: Campaign: Make the Control Alt Development workflow more flexible (cursor is dead)
active_campaigns.product_area: Control Alt / Development Workflow / Agent Infrastructure
active_campaigns.summary: The Control Alt development workflow must stop depending on Cursor as the single implementation agent or workflow host.

active_strands.title: Axiom Owner Workbench Strand
active_strands.summary: This Strand tracks a continuing line of attention around making Axiom usable as an owner-facing operating surface for Praxis-backed Control Alt work.

active_strands.title: Praxis Public Solution
active_strands.product_area: Praxis / Public access / Control Alt workflow
active_strands.summary: Create a public-readable Praxis layer that improves Control Alt workflow continuity, agent review, and Mara/ChatGPT access without exposing private implementation repos, private handoffs, runtime reports, LAN/device details, or unfinished product code.

active_fibers_recent.title: Praxis Public Functional MVP
active_fibers_recent.product_area: Praxis / Public access / Agent workflow replacement
active_fibers_recent.summary: Move Praxis Public from seed / proof-of-comprehension into a functional MVP that can support real Control Alt workflow. The MVP must reduce chat-memory drift, private-connector luck, and operator re-explanation.

active_fibers_recent.title: Praxis Public Generated Publisher v0
active_fibers_recent.summary: Make Praxis Public a generated, public-safe projection of private Praxis rather than a manually maintained documentation repo.

active_fibers_older.title: Praxis Eval Usage Efficiency
active_fibers_older.product_area: Praxis / Model Evaluation / Direct API Execution
active_fibers_older.summary: Track token usage as part of model viability.

active_fibers_older.title: Praxis Exec Direct API Prototype Fiber
active_fibers_older.product_area: Praxis / Mara / Direct API execution / Cost control
active_fibers_older.summary: Develop `praxis-exec` as a Praxis-owned local implementation harness that can use direct provider APIs as engines without replacing Cursor with another paid coding-agent wrapper.

active_fibers_older.title: Praxis Local Worker Command
active_fibers_older.summary: Replace fragile manual shell-packet workflows with a deterministic local worker command.

active_fibers_older.title: Praxis Self-Hosted Model Eval Pack
active_fibers_older.product_area: Praxis / Model Evaluation / Direct API Execution
active_fibers_older.summary: Make Praxis capable of running bounded AI model evaluation and implementation loops itself.
